title: Ignite Sentinel Promotion Event
description: IMP-154: a typed, append-only audit event recording when a governed fact is promoted to (or revoked from) persistent semantic memory. Additive projection over the ledger's governed signals, never a second source of truth.

trigger_type.description: Closed enum of governed promotion triggers; anything outside fails visibly rather than degrading to a generic event.

origin_ref.description: Citable reference for the promoted fact (e.g. the assumption id), used as the deterministic novelty-gate identity.
